info.title: Sift API
info.description: Sift's fraud detection and prevention API for sending events, retrieving scores, and managing decisions.

post.description: Send an event to Sift for scoring and workflow evaluation.

parameters.name: return_score
parameters.description: If true, return a score for the user in the response.

parameters.name: return_workflow_status
parameters.description: If true, return workflow status in the response.

parameters.name: fields
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of additional fields to return.

get.description: Retrieve the fraud score for a specific user.

parameters.name: abuse_types
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of abuse types to return scores for.

parameters.name: return_score_percentiles
parameters.description: If true, return score percentiles in the response.

post.description: Rescore a user based on the latest models.

parameters.name: abuse_types
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of abuse types to rescore.

post.description: Apply a decision to a specific user.

get.description: Retrieve decisions applied to a specific user.

post.description: Apply a decision to a specific order.

get.description: Retrieve decisions applied to a specific order.

post.description: Apply a decision to a specific session.

get.description: List all configured decisions for an account.

parameters.name: entity_type
parameters.description: Filter by entity type (e.g., user, order, session).

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of decisions to return.

post.description: Apply a label to a user. Deprecated: use the Decisions API instead.

delete.description: Remove a label from a user. Deprecated: use the Decisions API instead.

post.description: Send a verification code to a user via SMS, email, or WhatsApp.
Resend a verification code to a user.
Check a verification code submitted by a user.

basicAuth.description: HTTP Basic authentication using the API key as the username and an empty password.

AccountIdPath.name: accountId
AccountIdPath.description: The ID of the Sift account.

$api_key.description: Your Sift API key. Can be provided here or via HTTP Basic auth.

$type.description: The type of event to send.

$user_id.description: The user's account ID according to your systems.

$order_id.description: The ID for tracking an order within your system.

$time.description: The time of the event in unix timestamp (seconds).

$amount.description: The amount in micros (1/1,000,000 of the base currency unit).

$transaction_id.description: The ID for the transaction within your system.

$login_status.description: The status of the login attempt.

$failure_reason.description: The reason for the login failure.

$is_bad.description: Whether the user is considered bad (for labels).

$description.description: A description of the event or label.

$analyst.description: The analyst who reviewed the event.

$verified_value.description: The phone number or email that was verified.

$reason.description: The reason for the security notification.

$password_status.description: The status of the password update.

$content_id.description: The unique ID for the piece of content.

$items.description: The list of items in the order or cart.

$site_country.description: The country the site is operating in.

$phone.description: The phone number of the user.

$referrer_user_id.description: The user ID of the referrer.

$payment_methods.description: The payment methods associated with this event.

$card_bin.description: The first six digits of the credit card number.

$card_last4.description: The last four digits of the credit card number.

$stripe_address_line1_check.description: The Stripe address line 1 check result.

$stripe_address_zip_check.description: The Stripe address zip check result.

$phone.description: Phone number associated with the address.

$price.description: The price of the item in micros.

$user_agent.description: The user agent string of the browser.

$accept_language.description: The accept language header from the browser.

$os.description: The operating system of the app.

$device_unique_id.description: The unique identifier of the device.

$referrer_user_id.description: The user ID of the referrer.

$percentage_off.description: The percentage off as a decimal.

$minimum_purchase_amount.description: The minimum purchase amount in micros required for the discount.

error_message.description: A human-readable description of the status.

request.description: An echo of the request that was sent.

error_message.description: A human-readable description of the status.

user_id.description: The user ID that was scored.

scores.description: A map of abuse type to score details.

latest_labels.description: The latest labels applied to the user.

workflow_statuses.description: Workflow statuses triggered by the event.

value.description: The value associated with the reason.

state.description: The state of the workflow run.

config_display_name.description: The display name of the workflow configuration.

abuse_types.description: The abuse types targeted by this workflow.

entity.description: The entity the workflow was applied to.

history.description: The execution history of the workflow.

decision_id.description: The ID of the decision to apply.

analyst.description: The analyst who made the decision.

description.description: A description of why the decision was made.

time.description: The time the decision was made in unix timestamp (milliseconds).

entity.description: The entity the decision was applied to.

time.description: The time the decision was applied.

decisions.description: The list of decisions applied to the entity.

category.description: The category of the decision (e.g., BLOCK, WATCH, ACCEPT).

entity_type.description: The entity type the decision applies to.

abuse_type.description: The abuse type the decision addresses.

time.description: The time the decision was created.

has_more.description: Whether there are more results to fetch.

$description.description: A description of why the label was applied.

$analyst.description: The analyst who applied the label.

$user_id.description: The user ID to send the verification to.

$send_to.description: The phone number or email to send the verification to.

$verification_type.description: The type of verification to send.

$brand_name.description: The brand name to include in the verification message.

$language.description: The language for the verification message (ISO 639-1).

$event.description: The event associated with this verification.

$site_country.description: The country the site is operating in.

$user_id.description: The user ID to resend the verification to.

$verified_event.description: The event type associated with the original verification.

$verified_entity_id.description: The entity ID associated with the original verification.

$user_id.description: The user ID to check the verification for.

$verified_event.description: The event type associated with the verification.

$verified_entity_id.description: The entity ID associated with the verification.

error_message.description: A human-readable description of the status.

request.description: An echo of the request that was sent.

status.description: Non-zero status code indicating an error. Common codes: -4 (rate limited), -5 (invalid field), 51 (invalid API key), 52 (invalid event), 53 (missing field), 54 (no events), 55 (user not found), 60 (rate limited), 104 (invalid API version).

error_message.description: A human-readable description of the error.

request.description: An echo of the request that was sent.

tags.name: Events
tags.description: Send event data to Sift for fraud detection

tags.name: Scores
tags.description: Retrieve and rescore user fraud scores

tags.name: Decisions
tags.description: Apply and retrieve decisions on users, orders, and sessions

tags.name: Labels
tags.description: Label and unlabel users (deprecated, use Decisions API instead)

tags.name: Verification
tags.description: Send, resend, and check user verification codes
